price: Gewiß, ich fürchte für euch die Strafe eines gewaltigen Tages.
arabic: إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: innī akhāfu ʿalaykum ʿadhāba yawmin ʿaẓīmin
